subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! His honor Qábil is worthy of utmost praise for his eagerness, joy, enthusiasm, delight and rapture [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء جناب قابل نهایت ستایش از شوق و ذوق و شور و سرور و طرب و وله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @praise and encouragement
